So this is basically a ripoff of American Pie and all the other clones of that movie from over 20 years ago? It's kinda stupid that they would put out a movie like this now, where the whole message is that you're not a "man" if you haven't dated or had sex at 19. Do the makers of this film even realize that about half of people in their 20s and 30s still live with their parents, and that virginity rates are at an all-time high? And now they put out this movie that basically makes fun of them? I would have expected something like this in the 80s or 90s, MAYBE even the early 2000s, but now? Things have changed A LOT in just the last 20 years. But now it's okay to make fun of someone for being a VIRGIN AT 19??? The majority of people that age are virgins right now. God forbid they ever make a movie that makes fun of a woman, or black people, or any other race or religion besides Christianity. But this is perfectly okay. I guess it wasn't enough to make "The 40 Year Old Virgin" in 2005, now they have to shame people for being virgins at 19??? This is absolutely stupid and uncalled for. Not to mention that the plot of this movie basically rips off "Failure To Launch" also. Just disgusting.
